Name: UMaterialExpressionRuntimeVirtualTextureOutput
Description: Material output expression for writing to a runtime virtual texture.

Variables.Name: BaseColor
Variables.Description: Input for Base Color to output to virtual texture.

Variables.Name: Specular
Variables.Description: Input for Specular to output to virtual texture.

Variables.Name: Roughness
Variables.Description: Input for Roughness to output to virtual texture.

Variables.Name: Normal
Variables.Description: Input for Surface Normal to output to virtual texture.

Variables.Name: WorldHeight
Variables.Description: Input for World Height to output to virtual texture.

Variables.Name: Opacity
Variables.Description: Input for Opacity value used for blending to virtual texture.

Variables.Name: Mask
Variables.Description: Input for Mask to output to virtual texture.

Variables.Name: Displacement
Variables.Description: Input for World Height to output to virtual texture.

Variables.Name: Mask4
Variables.Description: Input for Mask to output to virtual texture.
